title: dactylorhiza × baicalica
intro: Dactylorhiza × baicalica, also known as Baikal orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that is native to the mountainous regions of Siberia and China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × baicalica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever and inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dactylorhiza × baicalica is used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
